meta.reasoning: 5d 8s offsuit is a weak starting hand. No reads on opponents yet, hand 1 of 30. Folding to preserve chips for better spots.
K6o in button position. Marginal hand but position advantage and cheap call (20/1000 = 2% of stack) makes calling worthwhile to see the flop. Will fold to heavy resistance without improvement.

6h 2c is the worst class of starting hand — no pair potential, no straight draw, no flush draw. Even with 5:1 pot odds calling 10 more, this hand has negligible equity. Folding preserves chips for stronger spots.
